SEARCH
Package com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Hostile

Class Gnome

java.lang.Object
com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.DumbEntity
com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.HumanoidEntity
com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Hostile.Gnome
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.bukkit.event.Listener
public class Gnome extends HumanoidEntity
Gnome entity class

Extends HumanoidEntity and implements specific behavior, drops, and appearance for the Gnome entity type.

The Gnome has a custom skin, defined drops including items from the NoorItems plugin, and uses the HostileAI for aggressive behavior.

  • Constructor Details

    • Gnome

      public Gnome(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin)
      Creates a new Gnome entity instance with the given plugin. Initializes the entity's properties such as XP drops, attack cooldown, and skin data. Also calls the initDrops method to set up the entity's drops.
      Parameters:
      plugin -

  • Method Details

    • initDrops

      public final void initDrops()
      Initializes the drops for the Gnome entity.
      Specified by:
      initDrops in class Entity

    • spawn

      public org.bukkit.entity.Mannequin spawn(org.bukkit.Location location)
      Spawns the Gnome entity at the given location. Overrides the spawn method to set the entity's scale attribute to 0.5, making it smaller than a normal mannequin.
      Overrides:
      spawn in class HumanoidEntity
      Parameters:
      location - The location to spawn the Gnome entity at
      Returns:
      The spawned Mannequin entity representing the Gnome
